name: Railway
description: Railway is a cloud platform for deploying applications and infrastructure. Deploy code from GitHub repos, manage services, databases, and environments with automatic scaling and zero-config deployments.

capabilities.name: list_projects
capabilities.description: List all projects in the authenticated user's Railway account.

capabilities.name: create_project
capabilities.description: Create a new Railway project with optional GitHub repo connection.

capabilities.name: deploy_service
capabilities.description: Trigger a deployment for a service within a project environment.

capabilities.name: manage_variables
capabilities.description: Get, set, or delete environment variables for a service.

capabilities.name: list_deployments
capabilities.description: List recent deployments for a service with status and logs.

capabilities.name: manage_databases
capabilities.description: Provision and manage databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB) within a project.
